data.name: Home_Badge
data.value: Free finance tools · No login · India-first

data.name: Home_Sub
data.value: Clean, mobile-first calculators and planners. Every tool shows the formula, a worked example, and secure vs volatile ways to reach the number — so you learn the “why”, not just the result.

data.name: Home_GainWhyText
data.value: Each tool starts with a short explanation so beginners can follow.

data.name: Home_GainFormulaText
data.value: We show the standard formula used in finance, in simple words.

data.name: Home_GainExampleText
data.value: Try the default numbers and understand how the result is formed.

data.name: Tools_Desc
data.value: Clean, structured calculators and planners. Each tool includes examples, assumptions, and a clear “why”.

data.name: NotFound_Message
data.value: Sorry, there's nothing at this address.

data.name: Tool_goal_Description
data.value: Secure vs volatile monthly saving to reach any target amount.

data.name: Tool_fire_Description
data.value: Find your FIRE corpus and SIP needed (inflation-aware).

data.name: Tool_fd_Description
data.value: Stagger deposits for yearly liquidity and re-investment flexibility.

data.name: Tool_sip_Description
data.value: Estimate long-term SIP growth with scenarios and projections.

data.name: Tool_cagr_Description
data.value: Understand annualized growth for any investment.

data.name: Tool_lumpsum_Description
data.value: Project a one-time investment forward in time.

data.name: Tool_emi_Description
data.value: Monthly EMI, total interest, and yearly amortization.

data.name: Tool_mortgage_Description
data.value: Home loan estimate with EMI and affordability.

data.name: Tool_inflation_Description
data.value: Future cost of today’s money with year-by-year growth.

data.name: Tool_interest_Description
data.value: Understand compounding on savings and loans.

data.name: Page_About_DisclaimerBody
data.value: FinYatra provides educational estimates only. We are not a SEBI-registered advisor, bank, or broker. Results depend on the assumptions you enter. Always verify important financial decisions with a qualified professional.

data.name: Page_About_Description
data.value: FinYatra helps you plan money with clarity — calculators, formulas, and worked examples in plain language.

data.name: Page_About_Offer4
data.value: Educational content: formulas, assumptions, and step-by-step explanations

data.name: Page_Contact_Description
data.value: Report a bug, request a feature, ask a question, or discuss a partnership.

data.name: Page_ComingSoon_LayoutHint
data.value: Use Tiles/List to switch the layout.

data.name: Page_Search_NoResultsBody
data.value: We couldn't find a tool matching "{0}". Try a shorter keyword like goal, sip, emi, or inflation.

data.name: Page_Privacy_Description
data.value: FinYatra is a calculator-first, privacy-friendly app. This policy explains what we collect, what we do not, and the choices you have.

data.name: Page_ComingSoon_RequestBody
data.value: Email your request (and what you want this tool to answer) to inbox.nuthan@gmail.com.

data.name: Page_Contact_ConsentText
data.value: I agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms.

data.name: Page_Contact_PrivacyText
data.value: We only use your message to respond. See our Privacy Policy.

data.name: Page_About_Offer2
data.value: No login, no sign-up, no paywall — use every tool for free

data.name: Page_About_ContactBody
data.value: Questions, feedback, or partnership enquiries? Visit our Contact page or email inbox.nuthan@gmail.com.

data.name: Page_About_Offer1
data.value: Goal planning, SIP, EMI, inflation, FIRE, and FD laddering calculators

data.name: Info_FormulaIntro
data.value: Read the formula first, then follow the steps below to see how the number is built.

data.name: Page_Contact_InfoBody
data.value: Have feedback on a calculator, spotted a bug, or want a new tool? Send a message using the secure form — we will email you back at the address you provide.

data.name: Page_Contact_Subtitle
data.value: We'd love to hear from you

data.name: Page_Sitemap_Description
data.value: A complete list of public pages for visitors and search engines.

data.name: Page_About_MaintainerBody
data.value: FinYatra is built and maintained by Nuthan Murarysetty — an independent developer passionate about clear, trustworthy finance tools for Indian users.

data.name: Page_Search_Description
data.value: Search tools by name or description.

data.name: Page_Sitemap_Intro
data.value: Machine-readable sitemap: sitemap.xml · Also useful for crawlers and AdSense review.

data.name: Page_About_MissionBody
data.value: FinYatra is a free collection of financial calculators and planners built for India. We believe everyone should understand the why behind the numbers — not just the result. Every tool shows the formula, a worked example, and practical context.

data.name: Page_ComingSoon_Description
data.value: This tool is planned next. Explore available calculators in the meantime.

data.name: Page_Terms_Description
data.value: Please read these terms before using FinYatra. By using the app you agree to them.

data.name: Page_ComingSoon_NextBody
data.value: We are building this calculator with the same formula-first, example-driven approach as the rest of FinYatra.

data.name: Page_Contact_SuccessBody
data.value: Thank you — your message was delivered securely. We will reply within a few business days.

data.name: Page_About_Offer3
data.value: Mobile-first design with Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, and Malayalam support

data.name: Page_Search_SubtitleEmpty
data.value: Type in the top search box and press Enter.

data.name: Tool_emi_LearnText
data.value: How interest rate and tenure change EMI and total interest paid.

data.name: Tool_inflation_LearnText
data.value: How inflation erodes purchasing power and why planning must account for it.

data.name: Tool_sip_LearnText
data.value: How time (tenure) and return rate have the biggest impact on long-term wealth.

data.name: Tool_goal_LearnText
data.value: How much to save monthly in a secure path (FD-like) vs a volatile path (equity-like), and how inflation changes the target.

data.name: Tool_fd_LearnText
data.value: Split a lump sum into multiple fixed deposits maturing in different years for liquidity.

data.name: Tool_fire_LearnText
data.value: FIRE helps you plan a corpus so that your investments can cover your yearly expenses.

data.name: Tool_goal_StepInflation_5
data.value: Multiply by targetToday to get the inflation-adjusted future target.

data.name: Tool_goal_FormulaSipNote
data.value: If return is 0%, sip = target / months.

data.name: Tool_goal_ExampleStep_3
data.value: Secure path at 7% FD-like return needs roughly ₹18,500/month.

data.name: Tool_goal_StepInflation_2
data.value: Convert inflation % to a decimal rate (e.g. 6% → 0.06).

data.name: Tool_goal_FormulaInflationNote
data.value: If inflation is off, futureTarget = targetToday.

data.name: Tool_fd_ExampleStep_2
data.value: Create FDs at 1 year, 2 years, 3 years so one FD matures every year.

data.name: Tool_goal_StepSip_5
data.value: This sip is the monthly amount that compounds to your target.

data.name: Tool_fire_ExampleStep_3
data.value: Yearly expense at retirement: ~₹19.2 lakh → FIRE corpus target ≈ ₹4.8 crore (25× rule).

data.name: Tool_goal_ExampleTitle
data.value: Product example: ₹10L car + emergency fund in 5 years

data.name: Tool_goal_ScenarioSubtitle
data.value: How much you need to invest each month to reach the target

data.name: Tool_sip_ExampleStep_5
data.value: Key insight: starting early and staying consistent matters more than chasing the highest return.

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Goal_3
data.value: Understand the impact of inflation on future required money

data.name: Tool_fire_ScenarioSubtitle
data.value: Monthly SIP needed to reach FIRE corpus

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_RealLife
data.value: Buying a car, building an emergency fund, down payment planning, education fund — anything with a target amount and deadline.

data.name: Tool_goal_StepSip_4
data.value: Apply SIP formula: sip = target × r / ((1 + r) ^ months − 1).

data.name: Tool_fire_ExampleStep_5
data.value: At 7% secure return, you'd need about ₹92,000/month — volatile path needs less saving but carries risk.

data.name: Tool_inflation_ExampleStep_3
data.value: In 20 years, that rises to roughly ₹1.6 lakh/month.

data.name: Tool_emi_ExampleStep_3
data.value: Total payment over 20 years: roughly ₹52 lakh — of which ~₹27 lakh is interest.

data.name: Tool_fire_ExampleStep_4
data.value: At 10% return, you need roughly ₹66,000/month SIP to reach this.

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Alt_RdFd_Cons
data.value: May not beat inflation after tax

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_WhyKnow
data.value: Most people save without a clear target. This makes your goal measurable and shows how returns and inflation change the required monthly saving.

data.name: Tool_inflation_ExampleStep_4
data.value: If your income or investments don't grow at least at inflation rate, you're effectively falling behind.

data.name: Tool_sip_ExampleStep_4
data.value: At 15% (aggressive), corpus can reach about ₹67 lakh.

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Purpose
data.value: Convert a goal amount and time horizon into a simple monthly saving plan.

data.name: Tool_goal_ExampleStep_4
data.value: Volatile base at 12% equity-like return needs roughly ₹16,400/month — but outcomes can range from ~₹19,800 (8%) to ~₹14,600 (15%).

data.name: Tool_sip_FormulaNote
data.value: FV is the future value of your investment. ^ means 'to the power of'.

data.name: Tool_sip_ExampleStep_2
data.value: At 10% (conservative), corpus grows to about ₹41 lakh.

data.name: Tool_inflation_ExampleStep_2
data.value: At 6% inflation, in 10 years you need about ₹89,500/month for the same lifestyle.

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Alt_Budget_When
data.value: When you only need a rough plan

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Alt_RdFd_When
data.value: When you want a fixed monthly deposit at fixed rate

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Goal_1
data.value: Make your goal time-bound and number-driven

data.name: Tool_fd_ExampleStep_4
data.value: This gives predictable liquidity without breaking a long-term deposit early.

data.name: Tool_fd_FormulaNote
data.value: P is the deposit, r the annual rate (decimal), t the years. Simplified annual compounding; ^ means 'to the power of'.

data.name: Tool_fire_ExampleTitle
data.value: Product example: retire at 50 with ₹50,000/month expenses

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Motto
data.value: Small steps, steady journey — save with clarity, not anxiety.

data.name: Tool_fire_Quote
data.value: Save money, and money will save you.

data.name: Tool_emi_BreakdownSubtitle
data.value: Principal vs interest paid each year

data.name: Tool_emi_ExampleStep_5
data.value: Always compare EMI affordability vs total interest cost before choosing tenure.

data.name: Tool_inflation_FormulaNote
data.value: i is the inflation rate per year (as a decimal, e.g. 6% = 0.06). ^ means 'to the power of'.

data.name: Tool_goal_StepInflation_4
data.value: Raise it to the number of years: (1 + inflationRate) ^ years.

data.name: Tool_goal_BreakdownSubtitle
data.value: If you save the base volatile monthly amount

data.name: Tool_goal_StepSip_1
data.value: Convert annual return to monthly: r = annualReturn / 12.

data.name: Tool_emi_ExampleStep_4
data.value: If you reduce tenure to 15 years, EMI rises but total interest drops significantly.

data.name: Tool_inflation_ExampleStep_5
data.value: This is why FIRE and goal planning must account for inflation, not just today's numbers.

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Alt_Sip_When
data.value: When you are investing in market-linked funds

data.name: Tool_goal_ExampleStep_5
data.value: Trade-off: secure gives predictable outcome; volatile may need less monthly saving but with uncertainty.

data.name: Tool_sip_ExampleStep_1
data.value: You invest ₹10,000 every month for 15 years — total ₹18 lakh invested.

data.name: Tool_goal_ExampleStep_2
data.value: With 6% inflation, the future target becomes about ₹13.4 lakh.

data.name: Tool_emi_FormulaNote
data.value: P is the loan principal. ^ means 'to the power of'.

data.name: Tool_goal_ExampleStep_1
data.value: Goal: ₹10,00,000 in today's money for a used car + emergency buffer in 5 years.

data.name: Tool_fd_ExampleStep_3
data.value: When the 1-year FD matures, you can use it or roll it into a new long FD.

data.name: Tool_fire_ExampleStep_2
data.value: Monthly expenses ₹50,000 today inflate to about ₹1.6 lakh/month by retirement (6% inflation).

data.name: Tool_fire_ExampleStep_1
data.value: Current age 30, target retirement at 50 — 20 years to build corpus.

data.name: Tool_goal_Info_Differentiation
data.value: Instead of just giving one number, FinYatra shows secure vs volatile scenarios side-by-side, and a year-by-year breakdown so users understand uncertainty and progress.

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Purpose
data.value: Estimate the retirement corpus needed and the monthly investing required to reach it.

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_WhyKnow
data.value: Retirement planning is mostly math + discipline. FIRE makes the goal concrete and shows the role of inflation, withdrawal rate assumptions, and return expectations.

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_RealLife
data.value: Choosing when you can stop full-time work, planning a career break, or ensuring investments can cover living expenses without salary.

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Goal_2
data.value: Translate expenses into a corpus target (rule of thumb)

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Goal_3
data.value: Compute monthly SIP needed for the time horizon

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Alt_Retirement_When
data.value: When you want a more detailed model

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Alt_Rule_When
data.value: When you want quick corpus thumb rule

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Alt_Goal_When
data.value: When you want to plan any goal, not only retirement

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Differentiation
data.value: FinYatra focuses on clarity: fewer inputs, inflation-aware numbers, and a projection table so users understand what the corpus means and how SIP builds it.

data.name: Tool_fire_Info_Motto
data.value: Freedom is built, not wished — plan it and invest steadily.

data.name: Tool_fire_StepInflate_2
data.value: Inflate it by assumed inflation for the years until retirement.

data.name: Tool_fire_StepInflate_3
data.value: This approximates what the same lifestyle costs at retirement.

data.name: Tool_fire_StepCorpus_1
data.value: Convert future monthly expense to yearly expense.

data.name: Tool_fire_FormulaSipTitle
data.value: Monthly SIP needed to reach corpus

data.name: Tool_fire_StepSipCalc_1
data.value: Convert annual return to monthly return r.

data.name: Tool_fire_StepSipCalc_3
data.value: Solve SIP such that contributions compound to the corpus target.

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Purpose
data.value: Estimate how a fixed monthly investment can grow over time with compounding.

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_WhyKnow
data.value: SIP planning helps you avoid guesswork. It connects your monthly saving habit with a future goal, and shows how time and return assumptions change the outcome.

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_RealLife
data.value: Building wealth for a house down payment, child education, retirement, or any long-term goal where you invest monthly.

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Goal_1
data.value: Estimate future value for a monthly SIP

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Goal_3
data.value: See year-by-year growth to build confidence and consistency

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Alt_Lumpsum_When
data.value: When you invest once, not monthly

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Alt_Lumpsum_Pros
data.value: Simple if you have a lump sum

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Alt_Goal_When
data.value: When you start from a target amount

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Differentiation
data.value: FinYatra adds structured scenarios and a readable projection table so users understand both the estimate and the uncertainty behind it.

data.name: Tool_sip_Info_Motto
data.value: Consistency builds wealth — one SIP at a time.

data.name: Tool_sip_StepFv_1
data.value: Convert annual return to monthly return r = annualReturn/12.

data.name: Tool_sip_StepFv_3
data.value: ((1+r)^n - 1)/r is the compounding multiplier for repeated monthly contributions.

data.name: Tool_sip_StepFv_4
data.value: Multiply by SIP amount to get estimated future value.

data.name: Tool_sip_StepFv_5
data.value: If r is 0%, FV = SIP × n.

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Purpose
data.value: Find the fixed monthly payment for a loan, and understand how much goes to interest vs principal over time.

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_WhyKnow
data.value: EMI affects monthly cashflow. Small changes in rate or tenure can change total interest by lakhs — knowing EMI helps you choose smarter tenures and prepayment strategy.

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_RealLife
data.value: Home loans, car loans, education loans, personal loans — anywhere you repay principal + interest monthly.

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Goal_1
data.value: Know the monthly EMI before taking a loan

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Goal_2
data.value: See total interest cost (hidden cost of long tenure)

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Goal_3
data.value: Understand amortization (early EMIs pay more interest)

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Alt_Bank_When
data.value: When you want a bank-specific offer

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Alt_Amort_When
data.value: When you want full monthly schedule

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Alt_Afford_When
data.value: When you want a quick check

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Differentiation
data.value: FinYatra keeps it minimal but complete: summary cards, scenario comparison, and a readable amortization breakdown so users understand the real cost of borrowing.

data.name: Tool_emi_Info_Motto
data.value: Borrow wisely — keep EMIs calm and predictable.

data.name: Tool_emi_StepEmi_1
data.value: P is your loan principal (loan amount).

data.name: Tool_emi_StepEmi_2
data.value: Convert annual interest rate to monthly rate: monthlyRate = annualRate/12.

data.name: Tool_emi_StepEmi_3
data.value: n is the number of months (years × 12).

data.name: Tool_emi_StepEmi_4
data.value: The formula gives the fixed payment that exactly pays principal+interest by month n.

data.name: Tool_emi_StepEmi_5
data.value: If rate is 0%, EMI = P / n.

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Purpose
data.value: Estimate how the cost of something increases over time due to inflation.

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_WhyKnow
data.value: Most financial goals fail because people plan in today's rupees. Inflation quietly increases your required amount — especially for long horizons like retirement and education.

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_RealLife
data.value: Future school fees, future rent, medical costs, lifestyle expenses in retirement, long-term projects like house construction.

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Goal_1
data.value: Convert today's cost into future cost

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Goal_2
data.value: Understand the compounding nature of inflation

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Goal_3
data.value: Make FIRE and goal planning realistic

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Alt_Rule72_When
data.value: When you want quick doubling time

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Alt_Cpi_When
data.value: When you need official inflation series

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Differentiation
data.value: FinYatra pairs the formula with a year-by-year table and real examples so users feel the impact, not just see a single number.

data.name: Tool_inflation_Info_Motto
data.value: Plan for tomorrow's rupee, not today's rupee.

data.name: Tool_inflation_StepFuture_2
data.value: Convert inflation % to a growth factor (1 + inflationRate).

data.name: Tool_inflation_StepFuture_3
data.value: Raise it to the number of years (compounding).

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_Purpose
data.value: Plan staggered fixed deposits so you get periodic maturities instead of locking everything into one date.

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_WhyKnow
data.value: Breaking an FD early often reduces interest. Laddering reduces the need to break deposits while keeping money relatively safe and available on schedule.

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_RealLife
data.value: Emergency fund parking, planned expenses (fees, travel, home renovation), and conservative investors who want predictable cashflow.

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_Goal_3
data.value: Balance return vs access to cash

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_Alt_Single_When
data.value: When you don't need interim liquidity

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_Alt_Rd_When
data.value: When you invest monthly not lump sum

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_Differentiation
data.value: FinYatra shows the ladder in a clean table with the per-FD split and maturity estimate so you can plan liquidity year-by-year.

data.name: Tool_fd_Info_Motto
data.value: Keep money safe — without locking yourself in.

data.name: Tool_fd_StepLadder_3
data.value: For each FD, estimate maturity using simplified annual compounding.

data.name: Tool_fd_StepLadder_4
data.value: Result is a ladder where one FD matures each year.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S01_Body
data.value: FinYatra ("we", "us", "the app") provides free educational financial calculators and planners. We are an independent project maintained by Nuthan Murarysetty. You can reach us anytime at

data.name: Page_Privacy_S02_L1
data.value: No account, sign-up, or login is required to use FinYatra.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S02_L2
data.value: The numbers you type into calculators are processed in your browser and are not sent to our servers.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S02_L3
data.value: We do not sell your personal data — ever.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S02_L4
data.value: We use privacy-respecting analytics and, where enabled, advertising to keep the app free.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S03_Body
data.value: Calculator inputs (for example target amounts, interest rates, tenure, and expenses) are used only to compute results on your device. They stay in your browser session and are cleared when you close or refresh the page, unless you deliberately copy or share a result. We do not store these values on a server or link them to your identity.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S04_Body
data.value: Like most websites, our hosting provider and any analytics or ad partners may automatically receive standard technical data such as your IP address, device and browser type, approximate region, referring page, and pages viewed. This helps us keep the site secure, understand which tools are useful, and fix problems.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S05_Body
data.value: We use a small amount of local storage to remember display preferences (such as your Tiles/List choice). If advertising is enabled, third parties may set cookies as described below. You can clear cookies and local storage at any time from your browser settings.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S06_Body
data.value: To keep FinYatra free, we may display ads through Google AdSense. Google and its partners may use cookies and device identifiers to serve and measure ads, including personalized ads based on your prior visits, subject to your settings. You can control ad personalization at

data.name: Page_Privacy_S06_LinkPolicy
data.value: How Google uses information from sites that use its services

data.name: Page_Privacy_S07_Body
data.value: We load the Inter font from Google Fonts and some libraries from public CDNs to render the app. These providers may receive your IP address as part of delivering their files. External links to sources (RBI, SEBI, banks, and similar) are provided for reference; their privacy practices are governed by their own policies.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S08_L1
data.value: Use the app without providing any personal information.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S08_L2
data.value: Block or delete cookies and local storage in your browser.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S08_L3
data.value: Opt out of personalized ads via your Google account or browser controls.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S08_L4
data.value: Contact us to ask any privacy question or raise a concern.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S09_Body
data.value: FinYatra is intended for a general audience and is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

data.name: Page_Privacy_S10_Body
data.value: We may update this policy as the app evolves. Material changes will be reflected here with a new "last updated" date. Continued use of FinYatra after changes means you accept the revised policy.

data.name: Page_Terms_S01_Body
data.value: By accessing or using FinYatra, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and our

data.name: Page_Terms_S01_BodyAfter
data.value: If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

data.name: Page_Terms_S02_Title
data.value: 2. Educational use only — not financial advice

data.name: Page_Terms_S02_Body
data.value: FinYatra provides general educational calculators, estimates, and explanations. It is not financial, investment, tax, or legal advice, and it does not create an advisor–client relationship. Results are illustrative and depend on the assumptions you enter. Always consult a qualified professional and verify figures with official sources before making financial decisions.

data.name: Page_Terms_S03_Body
data.value: We aim to keep formulas, examples, and rate assumptions correct and up to date, but we make no guarantee of accuracy, completeness, or timeliness. Interest rates, returns, inflation, and tax rules change frequently and vary by provider. You are responsible for confirming critical numbers independently.

data.name: Page_Terms_S04_Body
data.value: Projections use simplified models (for example fixed annual compounding). Real investments involve risk, fees, taxes, and market fluctuations, and may perform very differently from any estimate shown here. Past performance and sample returns do not guarantee future results.

data.name: Page_Terms_S05_L1
data.value: Do not misuse the app, attempt to disrupt it, or access it through automated abuse.

data.name: Page_Terms_S05_L2
data.value: Do not present FinYatra results as professional advice to others.

data.name: Page_Terms_S05_L3
data.value: Do not copy the app to impersonate it or mislead users.

data.name: Page_Terms_S06_Body
data.value: The FinYatra name, design, layout, and original content are owned by their author. You may use the calculators for personal, non-commercial purposes and share screenshots of your own results. All other rights are reserved.

data.name: Page_Terms_S07_Body
data.value: FinYatra may link to third-party sites (such as RBI, SEBI, and banks) and may display advertising. We do not control and are not responsible for third-party content, products, or practices. Visiting third-party sites is at your own risk and subject to their terms.

data.name: Page_Terms_S08_Body
data.value: To the maximum extent permitted by law, FinYatra and its author are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from your use of, or reliance on, the app or its results. The app is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind.

data.name: Page_Terms_S09_Body
data.value: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the app at any time, and we may update these terms. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.

data.name: Page_Terms_S10_Body
data.value: Interface icons are simple line icons rendered as inline SVG, based on the open-source

data.name: Page_Terms_S10_BodyMid
data.value: icon style (ISC / MIT licensed). The typeface is

data.name: Page_Terms_S10_BodyAfter
data.value: by Rasmus Andersson under the SIL Open Font License. If you believe any asset needs additional attribution, contact

data.name: Page_Terms_S10_BodyEnd
data.value: and we will address it promptly.

data.name: Page_Contact_Err_CaptchaLoad
data.value: We couldn't load the security question. Please tap Try again.

data.name: Page_Contact_Err_CaptchaAnswer
data.value: Enter the answer to the security check.

data.name: Page_Contact_Err_Submit
data.value: Unable to send message right now.

data.name: Page_Contact_Err_CaptchaWrong
data.value: Incorrect security check. Please try again.

data.name: Page_Contact_Val_MessageMin
data.value: Please add a bit more detail (min 10 characters).

data.name: Page_Contact_Val_ConsentRequired
data.value: Please accept the Privacy Policy and Terms.

data.name: Page_Contact_Err_ApiOffline
data.value: FinYatra.Server is not running. Start it with: dotnet run --project FinYatra.Server — then tap Retry below (or open https://localhost:7265/contact).

data.name: Page_Contact_Unavailable_Title
data.value: Can't send messages here right now

data.name: Page_Contact_Unavailable_Body_Before
data.value: Our secure contact form is temporarily unavailable. Please email us at

data.name: Page_Contact_Unavailable_Body_After
data.value: — we usually reply within 2–3 business days.

data.name: Page_Contact_Err_TooManyRequests
data.value: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
